title: chaenactis alpina var. rubella
intro: Chaenactis alpina var. rubella, commonly known as red pincushion, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its traditional medicinal uses, which include treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The therapeutic actions of Chaenactis alpina var. rubella are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as reduce pain and inflammation. Bioactive constituents present in this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Chaenactis alpina var. rubella can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and interactions with medications.
